_comment: TEMPLATE — copy this file, rename it to v[version].json (e.g. v1.1.json), and fill in the fields below.
_tagOptions: Use one of: 'Initial Release', 'Bug Fix', 'Feature Update', 'Major Update', 'Security Patch', or any custom label you want.
_githubReleaseUrl_note: Link to the specific GitHub release for this version.
_changesNote: Add as many change groups as you need. 'type' must be one of: 'added', 'fixed', 'removed'. Delete any groups you don't need.
